'''vatono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oatiness|oatiness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oatiness|oatiness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vatono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væteneth|væteneth]] || [[word:vætenej|vætenej]] || [[word:vætenesh|vætenesh]] || [[word:vætene|vætene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vatotonoth|vatotonoth]] || [[word:vatotonoj|vatotonoj]] || [[word:vatotonosh|vatotonosh]] || [[word:vatotono|vatotono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vatonoth|vatonoth]] || [[word:vatonoj|vatonoj]] || [[word:vatonosh|vatonosh]] || [[word:vatono|vatono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vatofnoth|vatofnoth]] || [[word:vatofnoj|vatofnoj]] || [[word:vatofnosh|vatofnosh]] || [[word:vatofnof|vatofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vatonotho|vatonotho]] || [[word:vatonojo|vatonojo]] || [[word:vatonosho|vatonosho]] || [[word:vatonoko|vatonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vatonoth|vatonoth]] || [[word:vatonoj|vatonoj]] || [[word:vatonosh|vatonosh]] || [[word:vatono|vatono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vatonothol|vatonothol]] || [[word:vatonojol|vatonojol]] || [[word:vatonoshol|vatonoshol]] || [[word:vatonokol|vatonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vatonothotho|vatonothotho]] || [[word:vatonojojo|vatonojojo]] || [[word:vatonoshosho|vatonoshosho]] || [[word:vatonoko|vatonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vatonothon|vatonothon]] || [[word:vatonojon|vatonojon]] || [[word:vatonoshon|vatonoshon]] || [[word:vatonokon|vatonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vatonothoro|vatonothoro]] || [[word:vatonojoro|vatonojoro]] || [[word:vatonoshoro|vatonoshoro]] || [[word:vatonokoro|vatonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
